name: tft-bot
description: TFT auto-play bot: Rust core + Python RL (SB3 PPO)

scripts.rl:m1: cargo build -p agent-cli --release && cd python && python -m tft_bot_rl.train_ppo --total-steps 100000 --agent-cli ../target/release/agent-cli.exe && python -m tft_bot_rl.eval_baselines --seeds 32 --agent-cli ../target/release/agent-cli.exe --ppo-model artifacts/ppo_tft.zip --output artifacts/eval/m1-report.json
scripts.s4:collect: cargo run -p agent-cli --release --features win_window,input_sim -- run-afk --policy rule --games 5 --max-steps 120 --model dummy --trajectory artifacts/trajectories/batch-rule.jsonl --report artifacts/reports/batch-rule.json
scripts.s4:onnx: cargo run -p agent-cli --release --features win_window,input_sim -- run-afk --policy onnx --games 5 --max-steps 120 --model artifacts/ppo_tft.onnx --trajectory artifacts/trajectories/batch-onnx.jsonl --report artifacts/reports/batch-onnx.json
scripts.check:all: npm run cargo:fmt && npm run cargo:clippy && npm run cargo:test
